textByHashes.64741f2c8d99dbc20f4be3cb39c4b299adcf0a71: Don't you know, you're in the land of your own dreams!
textByHashes.907ed56f01d59da94d1f9de7988cf583027074ac: Well, this is a waking sleep.
textByHashes.bb0a08acbc6da4c86a27ee00db707d625b8797b1: Just use this lectern - it's the book of your life, all that has been, all that is and blank pages for all that will be. In reading this you will return your mind to reality and the conscious world.
textByHashes.f431a083b37c652d908b0a543d180048bcd6e580: That is totally up to you. This is a test, it wouldn't be fair if I gave you the answers now would it? But I can tell you that there is a selection of tasks that you can choose from. I like to call them, 'A game of chance',
textByHashes.0627eb394ff6b0f4fdad12e348defeeefd7146e0: 'Communicating in numbers', 'Chop, chop, chop away', 'Where am I?', 'The race is on!', and 'Anything you can do...'.
textByHashes.e63634954d65f8500e4b755eaa94e090190bbcff: Then you don't know your mind too well, do you!
textByHashes.2e62dfd27c9fa37e04aa64eef652de1434febb9d: And your thoughts on its meaning?
textByHashes.737a367f661c8751d77a0916d163aff4427a30f1: And what lesson do you suppose that teaches?
textByHashes.4c2ce2002653fd99c628ed1476125bb6aaeea519: And did you learn anything from this? What do you suppose this part of your dream was trying to tell you?
textByHashes.36e1078b68138a05d4257eaf6bf6727d188f27bd: Exactly. By understanding others around you and through communication with your surroundings you can in turn learn a great deal about yourself.
textByHashes.7e4321bcf2f9ea642dbd1a4365174635e303f1fb: That's dreams for you. But there must have been some logic behind it!
textByHashes.ae02b33793ed902dc66cbd17680200ec21cba0f2: That seems about right to me.
textByHashes.eacc6a280eae59e98522cbea5fceac8108889433: What do you suppose that means then?
textByHashes.9353ff52c70a9369160f9825ad2d5029b24da015: Interesting. Do you have any interpretations?
textByHashes.1f692d41a9f9e2199da82d231fcb34f779f2d48b: That's it! You've learnt the 6 core lessons: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of your past and
textByHashes.2a252eb709c4362bae2d9518ea3f7470e4db4731: present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown.
textByHashes.1df73a29b28f96dcacb2409f542d62f67db5afbb: There is one more challenge you must face. I can't tell you what to expect, you are still being tested.
textByHashes.0548b7408ced8659a223206583ee7095829b8cd6: Would you like to face your final challenge?
textByHashes.af1daf6a8c3e0a39b15f19b1e5c8089a93508570: Hello again. So you have learnt the 6 core lessons: Make sense of others to understand yourself, you must be able to relate to others, you must use your abilities to progress, you must be aware of your past and
textByHashes.1e1b3fc691c8b1f737deca77c27f6c06581dc096: present to help you in the future, you must harness your confidence, and you must appreciate the unknown. Because magic is within, by understanding these lessons you can access the power of the moon
textByHashes.a4dd02781980aed946351cd052045d3999c3b25e: clan. You are almost finished here. There is one more challenge which you must face.
textByHashes.35eae7a6490b8ac3d2c3dbc25288aeea4af1f4ba: Sorry. So how about it, are you ready?
textByHashes.b4f6c9452aa227c6503d424f8df6a85c62a553b8: Well done, I think your lesson is complete, best you wake yourself up! Go read the book on the lectern.
